questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Concurrency?
options: Inefficient scaling of Kernel-level threads vs User-level green threads.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Kernel-level threads vs User-level green threads.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Kernel-level threads vs User-level green threads scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
